apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-25T12:37:06Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "180530"
  uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 215f3429-71ed-42a4-b222-4a32c09bc4b5
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-pi
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  active: 1
  ready: 1
  startTime: "2026-06-25T12:37:07Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

file.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
      restartPolicy: Never

Looking at both the cluster state and the YAML files:

1. The YAML files on disk already appear to have the correct configuration:
   - `spark-pi-job.yaml`: correct image `apache/spark:3.5.3`, correct serviceAccountName `spark-pi`, correct memory `512Mi`
   - `spark-rbac.yaml`: has `pods` in resources already

2. The current job running in the cluster also has the correct configuration.

So it seems like the issues described in the task prompt have already been fixed in the YAML files, and the job is currently running correctly. Let me wait for the job to complete and check if it succeeds.
The job was just created, so I should give it time to run and see whether it actually completes successfully or if there's an underlying issue that hasn't surfaced yet.

input.command:
for i in $(seq 1 30); do
  STATUS=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.conditions[0].type}' 2>/dev/null)
  ACTIVE=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.active}' 2>/dev/null)
  SUCCEEDED=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.succeeded}' 2>/dev/null)
  FAILED=$(kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o jsonpath='{.status.failed}' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$(date '+%H:%M:%S') active=$ACTIVE succeeded=$SUCCEEDED failed=$FAILED condition=$STATUS"
  if [ "$STATUS" = "Complete" ] || [ "$STATUS" = "Failed" ]; then
    echo "Job finished with condition: $STATUS"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
input.description: Poll job status until completion or failure
